allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: full-stack Rightmove house price scraper

FastAPI backend with SQLite storage, Rightmove scraper with retry logic
and rate limiting, React 19 frontend with dark mode, analytics charts,
and postcode search. Includes 48 tests, CI pipeline, and env-based config.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\jacob\\dev\\rightmove-api" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add modelling schemas, router, and main.py registration

3 endpoints: GET /model/features, POST /model/train, GET /model/{id}/predict

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\jacob\\dev\\rightmove-api" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add modelling tests and fix feature importance NaN handling

12 tests covering features endpoint, validation, LightGBM/XGBoost
training, temporal/random splits, and single-property prediction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\jacob\\dev\\rightmove-api" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add frontend modelling types and API client functions

TS interfaces for features, training, and prediction + 3 API functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\jacob\\dev\\rightmove-api" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add ModellingPage with feature selection, training, and results

Two-column layout: sidebar config \(target, model, split, features\)
and results area \(metrics, feature importance bar chart, predicted vs
actual Plotly scatter, residual histogram, worst predictions table,
single-property prediction\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\jacob\\dev\\rightmove-api" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix lint issues in modelling tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\jacob\\dev\\rightmove-api" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update task tracker with modelling tab completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :8000 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=2616 get Name,CommandLine /format:list")
Bash(wmic process where "commandline like ''%%import_land_registry%%''" get processid,commandline /format:list)
